name: Image Scout
description: Prepares local and remote images for reliable model vision: inspection, orientation normalization, resizing, overlapping detail tiles, optional local OCR, task-specific reasoning protocols, and provider-native payload files.

tools.name: inspect_image
tools.description: Inspect a local image path or public HTTP(S) URL before sending it to a vision model. Returns format, dimensions, orientation, animation state, hash, and a recommended detail strategy.

source.description: Local image path or public http(s) image URL.

tools.name: prepare_image
tools.description: Normalize EXIF orientation, flatten transparency, strip metadata, resize oversized images, and emit a provider-safe JPEG, PNG, or WebP artifact.

source.description: Local image path or public http(s) image URL.

max_edge.description: Maximum width or height in pixels. Default: 2048.

tools.name: build_vision_bundle
tools.description: Build the high-reliability vision package: normalized overview, overlapping detail tiles when needed, optional local OCR, ordered artifact paths, an inspection protocol, and a strict response contract. Use this for screenshots, documents, charts, code, or dense images.

source.description: Local image path or public http(s) image URL.

question.description: The specific question the model should answer after inspecting the image.

tile_size.description: Detail crop size in pixels. Default: 1280.

overlap.description: Fractional overlap between adjacent tiles. Default: 0.12.

max_tiles.description: Hard cap on detail tiles. Default: 12.

tools.name: build_vision_bundle_with_ocr
tools.description: Build the same high-reliability vision package while also running optional, fully local Tesseract OCR. Treat OCR as a fallible hint and verify it against the image.

source.description: Local image path or public http(s) image URL.

question.description: The specific question the model should answer after inspecting the image.
question.default: Extract and interpret the visible text.

tile_size.description: Detail crop size in pixels. Default: 1280.

overlap.description: Fractional overlap between adjacent tiles. Default: 0.12.

max_tiles.description: Hard cap on detail tiles. Default: 12.

ocr_language.description: Installed Tesseract language code. Default: eng.

tools.name: vision_prompt
tools.description: Generate a compact task-specific prompt that makes the model separate visible facts, exact text, interpretation, and uncertainty.

tools.name: encode_for_provider
tools.description: Normalize and encode an image into a provider-native JSON content block. Writes base64 to a payload file so tool output stays small. Supports OpenAI Responses, OpenAI Chat, Anthropic, Gemini, and a generic schema.

source.description: Local image path or public http(s) image URL.

max_edge.description: Maximum normalized width or height. Default: 2048.

tools.name: doctor
tools.description: Check Image Scout dependencies and report local vision-preparation capabilities.

SWITCHBAY_IMAGE_SCOUT_DIR.description: Optional artifact directory override. Defaults to ~/.switchbay/image-scout.
